what: AC compliance for FSC-2417: 4 ACs current (refinement=12, delta=-8) — verdict=FAIL
why: Story FSC-2417 has lost 8 acceptance criteria since refinement (12 → 4 ACs), a significant drift that creates regulatory risk on a HIGH-FCA story touching COBS 9.2 suitability logic. The developer must immediately recover the missing 8 ACs from the refinement baseline—particularly those covering risk profile validation, suitability assessment integration, and audit trail requirements—before proceeding to code review. Recommend Refinement gate review with Compliance Officer to ensure no regulatory coverage gaps remain before Development resumes.
